headline: 85% confident the next 25 items finish by Jun 10, 2026 (starting May 17, 2026).
definition: Monte Carlo forecast of when N items will finish, drawing daily throughput samples from the training window. The histogram is the distribution of simulated completion dates; percentile lines mark confidence thresholds. Read forward: higher confidence = later date.

summary.reading: forward — higher confidence means a later date

horizon.reading: Forecast horizon is within the training window — relatively trusted. Shorter is better.

key_insight: Median outcome is Jun 4, 2026. 95% confidence is Jun 14, 2026. The gap between 50% and 85% is the wait-cost of being predictable — wider gap = more daily-throughput variance.
next_actions: Commit externally on the 85% date (Jun 10, 2026), not the 50% date (Jun 4, 2026).
Re-run weekly to track drift in the forecast.
caveats: Assumes the next weeks will look like the recent past — no regime change.
Zero-merge days are included as real samples; bad days happen in the simulator.
Throughput unit is 'completed items', not 'features' — works only if item size is stable.

vocabulary.Throughput: Items completed per unit time (here: per day). The empirical input Monte Carlo Simulation draws from.
vocabulary.Training window: The recent period whose daily throughput we sample. Defaults to the last 30 calendar days ending yesterday-UTC — the recommended horizon.
vocabulary.Monte Carlo Simulation: Draws daily throughput with replacement, simulates forward, and repeats (10,000 runs by default). The distribution of outcomes is the forecast.
vocabulary.Results histogram: The empirical distribution produced by Monte Carlo. X-axis = outcome (date for when-done; item count for how-many); Y-axis = simulation-run frequency.
vocabulary.Percentile: Confidence level. For when-done (date axis): read FORWARD — 85% confidence is a later date. For how-many (items axis): read BACKWARD — 85% confidence is FEWER items, a more conservative commitment.

cli_invocation: uv run flow forecast when-done --repo pytest-dev/pytest --items 25 --start-date 2026-05-17 --history-start 2026-04-17 --history-end 2026-05-16 --runs 10000 --seed 42 --offline
